text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif
Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = a + bi and equate real/imaginary parts.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif
Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use z̄ = a - bi where needed.
State final result in requested form.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = r(cosθ + i sinθ) = r cisθ.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use De Moivre: z^n = r^n cis(nθ), then convert back if needed.
